channel.title: Backend on cron.umbe.me
channel.description: Recent content in Backend on cron.umbe.me

item.title: Build a Terminal Emulator with libghostty: Ghostling Architecture
item.description: Ghostling demonstrates how to build minimal terminal emulators using libghostty’s production-grade C API. This guide covers PTY lifecycle management, terminal state machines, and escape sequence parsing for custom developer tools.
